title: CT6 static tactic graph — Active/dormant dichotomy
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy). It requires the complete 20-node array in fixed source order from CT6.N01 through CT6.N20, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy) tactic specification; must equal "CT6".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT6.N01, "Definition — monitored local test and activity threshold", in CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy); must equal "CT6.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT6.N01, "Definition — monitored local test and activity threshold"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT6.N01, "Definition — monitored local test and activity threshold"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT6.N02, "Dichotomy lemma — are there enough active tests?", in CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy); must equal "CT6.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT6.N02, "Dichotomy lemma — are there enough active tests?"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT6.N02, "Dichotomy lemma — are there enough active tests?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT6.N03, "Lemma — active tests force explicit demand", in CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy); must equal "CT6.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT6.N03, "Lemma — active tests force explicit demand"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT6.N03, "Lemma — active tests force explicit demand"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT6.N04, "Payload lemma — build P_6→4 — active demand ledger", in CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy); must equal "CT6.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT6.N04, "Payload lemma — build P_6→4 — active demand ledger"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT6.N04, "Payload lemma — build P_6→4 — active demand ledger"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT6.N05, "CT 4 — charging", in CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy); must equal "CT6.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT6.N05, "CT 4 — charging"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT6.N05, "CT 4 — charging"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT6.N06, "Definition — dormant branch and first failing scale", in CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy); must equal "CT6.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT6.N06, "Definition — dormant branch and first failing scale"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT6.N06, "Definition — dormant branch and first failing scale"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT6.N07, "Lemma — first-failure witness is bounded and structural", in CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy); must equal "CT6.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT6.N07, "Lemma — first-failure witness is bounded and structural"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT6.N07, "Lemma — first-failure witness is bounded and structural"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT6.N08, "Scope candidate — no bounded first failure — scope audit", in CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy); must equal "CT6.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT6.N08, "Scope candidate — no bounded first failure — scope audit"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT6.N08, "Scope candidate — no bounded first failure — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT6.N09, "Payload record — P_6→10: witness appears after refinement", in CT6 (Active/dormant dichotomy); must equal "CT6.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT6.N09, "Payload record — P_6→10: witness appears after refinement"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT6.N09, "Payload record — P_6→10: witness appears after refinement"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT6.N10, "Lemma — P_6→10 satisfies CT10 trigger"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.
